prs.title: feat: granular exit codes for error types
prs.description: Map YNAB API error types to distinct exit codes (0-7) instead of always exiting 1. Enables agents and scripts to branch on auth failures vs not-found vs rate limits without parsing output. See ARCHITECTURE-GAPS.md Gap 5 for the full exit code scheme.

prs.title: feat: automatic retry with exponential backoff on 429/5xx
prs.description: Add retry logic with exponential backoff + jitter for 429 (rate limit) and 5xx (server error) responses. YNAB's 200 req/hr limit means agents will hit 429 regularly. Add --no-retry flag to opt out. See ARCHITECTURE-GAPS.md Gap 2.

prs.title: feat: --dry-run flag for all write operations
prs.description: Add --dry-run to all write commands (transactions create/update/delete/split/batch-update/import, categories update/budget, payees update, scheduled delete, api POST/PUT/PATCH/DELETE). Outputs the payload that would be sent without executing. Essential for agent safety. See ARCHITECTURE-GAPS.md Gap 3.

prs.title: feat: --format flag for table/csv/yaml output
prs.description: Add --format flag (json|table|csv|yaml) to all read commands. JSON remains default. Table for human use, CSV for spreadsheet export, YAML for config workflows. See ARCHITECTURE-GAPS.md Gap 4.

prs.title: feat: add agent skill definitions (skills/ directory)
prs.description: Add structured SKILL.md files for agent orchestration. Covers shared conventions (auth, flags, errors) and each resource (budgets, accounts, transactions, categories, payees, months, scheduled). Already generated in skills/ directory — this PR just commits them.
